productDisplayName: Bata Men Black Mocassino Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Create the right board room impression with this stacked-heeled formal shoe from bata. Bata is a household name when it comes to footwear and this shoe tells us why - with its sleek upper and tough outsole. Brave the city traffic with this shoe that is as hard wearing as it is stylish, at a reasonable price! Product Details Black upper with ruffled stitch details at the seams of the toe box and central lace-ups Padded inner and tongue Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with an upraised heel that has grooves Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in sunlight
